## Release: dev → main

### Compliance Checklist

- [ ] All new skills have medical disclaimers ("not a substitute for professional medical judgment")
- [ ] Safety classifications are appropriate for each skill's risk level
- [ ] Evidence levels match cited references
- [ ] No CDS/FDA claims in any content
- [ ] License compatibility verified (MIT/Apache-2.0/BSD auto-approved)
- [ ] Physician reviewer has approved (label: `physician-review-approved`)
- [ ] All CI checks pass (type-check, build, security scan)
- [ ] This is a research and learning tool, not clinical decision support
